args: $module = Get-Module -ListAvailable PowerShellEditorServices | Sort-Object Version -Descending | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $module) { throw 'PowerShellEditorServices is not installed. Run: Install-Module -Name PowerShellEditorServices -Scope CurrentUser' }; Import-Module $module.Path; Start-EditorServices -HostName 'Claude Code' -HostProfileId 'ClaudeCode' -HostVersion '1.0.0' -Stdio -BundledModulesPath (Split-Path $module.Path) -SessionDetailsPath ([System.IO.Path]::Combine([System.IO.Path]::GetTempPath(), "pses-claude-$PID.json")) -LogPath '/dev/null' -LogLevel 'None' -EnableConsoleRepl
